summary.sosovalue: On April 17, 2026, SoSoValue generated positive buzz among crypto users for its comprehensive data dashboard featuring AI-powered insights, ETF flows, on-chain metrics, and sentiment analysis, helping traders cut through market noise effectively. summary.sodex: SoDEX, the high-performance on-chain order book DEX built on SoSoValue's ValueChain L1, saw enthusiastic promotion on April 17, 2026, with users urging daily trading to earn SoPoints for the 150M $SOSO airdrop pool.
